purpose: Stub schema for Q6a sector overlays. Currently lists the 14 sector IDs as the canonical enumeration source so the Q6a enum can be expanded from this file later. The `overlays` map is intentionally empty: per-sector node activations and rule overrides land here when sector-specific logic is wired (post Sprint 4 Step 3).
extraction_notes: Sector IDs follow snake_case for stable JSON keys. Display labels (with slashes, parentheses, etc.) are a frontend concern. The current Q6a enum (5 placeholder values) covers a subset; expanding to all 14 is tracked as a follow-up.
